Positive total GEX (0.26B net) indicates dealers are long gamma and will suppress volatility, supporting orderly price action. The extreme reverse_smirk skew (0.40 ratio) in 0DTE reflects call euphoria with expensive calls vs cheap puts - bullish sentiment. Max Pain clusters at 24200-24400 creating upside magnetic attraction. Primary directional bias: UP toward 24200-24400 zone. Key risk: Monthly negative GEX (-0.25B) introduces structural fragility if spot breaks below 23500.
